title: Yijing Hexagram 43: Guai (Breakthrough)
description: Hexagram 43 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 43 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Breakthrough. One must resolutely make the matter known at the court of the king. It must be announced truthfully.
